Graphics Overviews

This section contains overviews related to DirectX graphics for Xbox. It is organized into the following topics:

  • Alphakill
  • Anisotropic Texture Filtering
  • Antialiasing
  • Begin/End Blocks
  • Direct3D Primitives for Xbox
  • Direct3D Rendering Pipeline
  • Direct3D Resources
  • Memory and Graphics
  • Occlusion Culling
  • Persistent Vertex Attributes
  • Point Sprites
  • Push-Buffers
  • Textures
  • Two-Sided Lighting
  • Video Modes and Settings
  • Visibility Testing
